news.summary: <p>On the 24th day of the US-Israeli war on Iran, President Donald Trump’s<a href="https://www.dawn.com/news/1984607/trump-backs-down-on-strikes-on-irans-power-network-claims-us-and-tehran-holding-talks"> decision</a> to defer planned strikes on Iran’s power plants and energy infra

news.headline: US signs nearly $1 billion deal with France's TotalEnergies to end offshore wind projects
news.summary: The United States and TotalEnergies signed an agreement on Monday to end the French company's offshore US wind farm projects and redirect those funds towards fossil fuel production, with the US interior secretary saying the deal was worth nearly $1 billion.
